event_title: Ask Me Anything: Cognos Analytics - April Edition
title: Ask Me Anything: Cognos Analytics - April Edition
speaker_text: Cognos Analytics Armin Kamal, Cognos Analytics Rodrigo Andrade, Cognos Analytics Sami El, Cognos Analytics Tim Aston, Cognos Analytics Zach Taylor, Cognos Support, Rachel Su
description: **Target Audience:** IBM Cognos Analytics Users or Clients. Note that this is an open Q&A session to address queries about the IBM Cognos Analytics product. **Summary:** Join our Cognos Analytics Product Management team live to ask and get answers to your most pressing Cognos Analytics questions. If you like product roadmap sneak previews, don't worry - we'll be sharing those, too. Register now and join us for a lively session where you can ask anything about Cognos! Register for this webinar at: **[https://ibm.webcasts.com/starthere.jsp?ei=1602659&tp_key=805104fcb9](https://ibm.webcasts.com/starthere.jsp?ei=1602659&tp_key=805104fcb9)** **Key Speakers:** * **Rachel Su** \- Product Management\, Cognos Analytics * **Tim Aston** \- Product Management\, Cognos Analytics * **Zach Taylor** \- Product Management\, Cognos Analytics * **Rodrigo Andrade** \- Product Management\, Cognos Analytics * **Sami El Cheikh** \- Product Management\, Cognos Analytics * **Armin Kamal** \- Proven Practices Advisor\, Cognos Support
